situation: audit-2026-07-08-043 finding AE-L-002: notify_via_ntfy() passes unbounded message to curl -d. ntfy.sh free tier silently drops messages >4KB. All current callers (main()) pass hardcoded ~30-byte strings so no active bug, but function signature accepts arbitrary input — latent defense-in-depth gap.
action: Added UTF-8-safe 4096-byte truncation guard in notify_via_ntfy() with stderr warning when truncated. Direct edit in worktree (case-104 escape hatch: opt-worktree.sh cp-guard skips unmodified files on main).

audit_findings.finding: notify_via_ntfy() passes unbounded message body to curl -d; ntfy.sh free tier 4KB limit causes silent truncation for future dynamic-content callers
